overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character in a white coat walking through a neon-lit urban alley at night. The environment features industrial architecture, glowing signage with Asian characters, atmospheric haze, and follows an NPC walking ahead through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk alley with industrial facades

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the alley following an NPC ahead, passing industrial structures on the right

notable_agents.action: NPC in gray outfit walking ahead of the main character at a steady pace

entered.detail: large red neon sign with 'HQ' letters glowing prominently at the end of the alley
tall vertical neon sign displaying '2023' and Japanese characters in red and white
green-lit counter structure with glass windows and industrial equipment inside
dark metal industrial building facade with pipes and panels
row of simple benches along the left wall of the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, covered cyberpunk alley at night, illuminated by warm red neon signs. The camera follows a character in a white coat walking behind an NPC in gray. To the right is a green-lit vending station against an industrial metal facade, while benches line the left wall. The large 'HQ' neon sign glows at the end of the corridor, guiding the direction of movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit corridor with commercial signage and seating

events.description: character turns slightly left while continuing forward, passing the green vending station and approaching the benches

agents.ego_description: continuing down the alley toward the HQ neon sign, passing benches on the left side while maintaining distance from the NPC ahead

notable_agents.action: NPC in gray outfit continuing to walk ahead toward the HQ sign, gradually increasing distance

entered.detail: white illuminated vending machine or door with bright interior lighting on the right wall
large digital screen displaying a green alien face graphic with purple borders
exposed industrial pipes and conduits running along the left wall above the benches

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the green vending station, which falls behind as the camera turns slightly left. The benches on the left come into closer view alongside exposed industrial pipes and a digital billboard displaying a green graphic. The white vending machine becomes visible on the right as the character approaches the glowing 'HQ' sign at the end of the corridor, with the NPC ahead moving further into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, neon-lit cyberpunk alley that draws closer to a glowing destination. It begins behind a character in a white coat following an NPC, moving past warm red neon signs and a green-lit vending station set against an industrial metal facade. As the camera advances, the vending station falls behind and the view shifts slightly left to reveal benches and exposed industrial pipes alongside a digital billboard with green graphics. The scene then opens further as a white vending machine appears on the right, while the camera pushes deeper into the corridor toward the luminous HQ sign. Finally, the movement culminates as the NPC recedes into the distance, guiding the perspective toward the bright glow at the end of the alley.
